effect_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张手牌扣置于你装备区里的【木牛流马】下，然后可以将此牌移动至一名装备区里没有宝物牌的其他角色的装备区；你可以将此牌下的牌如手牌般使用或打出。
effect_en: Once per turn during your action phase, you may place one card face down under [Wooden Ox and Flowing Horse] in your equipment zone, and then choose to move this card to the equipment zone of another character who does not have any treasure cards in their equipment zone; you may use or play the cards under this card as if they were in your hand.

faq.q_cn: 木牛流马里的牌算手牌吗？
faq.a_cn: 不算。储备牌不在手牌区，不受针对手牌的技能影响，只有当木牛流马本身被弃置或夺走时才会失去。
faq.q_en: Do cards stored in the Wooden Ox count as hand cards?
faq.a_en: No. Stored cards are not in your hand and are unaffected by skills targeting hand cards. They are only lost if the Wooden Ox itself is discarded or stolen.

faq.q_cn: 把木牛流马传给别人时，储备牌也一起转移吗？
faq.a_cn: 是的，所有储备牌随木牛流马一并移交。
faq.q_en: When I pass the Wooden Ox, do the stored cards transfer too?
faq.a_en: Yes. All stored cards transfer along with the Wooden Ox.

faq.q_cn: 没有放入储备牌时可以移动木牛流马吗？
faq.a_cn: 不可以，必须先放入一张牌才能选择移动。
faq.q_en: Can I move the Wooden Ox without storing a card first?
faq.a_en: No. You must store a card before you can choose to move it.
